Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Fix reversed Polyak averaging in target network update (v4.1)

The target_params update had coefficients swapped: was applying 0.9 weight
to old target and 0.1 to current params (target barely moves), instead of
0.9 to current and 0.1 to old (target tracks current). This matches
optax.incremental_update(new, old, step_size=0.9) from the reference.

Root cause of "learn then forget" pattern in v3.1/v4 (peaked 70-74%,
then collapsed as value targets became increasingly stale).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Scope variable types per function in type inference to prevent cross-function name collisions

Variable types were tracked in a flat dict keyed only by name, so two functions
using the same variable name (e.g., x=42 and x="hello") would collide. Now
var_types is keyed by (function_label, var_name) with global-scope fallback.
Adds 3 unit tests and 15 cross-language integration tests (all 15 languages).
ADR-084 documents the design decision.

tests)

commit.message:
fix: postinstall bootstrap permission — config not created on fresh install

mktemp creates files with mode 600 (root-only). chmod +x only adds
execute for owner, leaving the file unreadable by the console user.
The su -l bootstrap then fails silently with "Permission denied".

Fix: chmod 755 so the console user can read and execute the script.

Bump to v0.1.4.

gemini-2.0-flash-preview-image-generation model. Returns base64 data URLs
from the Gemini generateContent API.

in Settings with appropriate model selection and defaults.

chore: v0.3.11 — 城堡攻城戰系統 + handler 架構修正 + 隊伍/GM/掉落補齊

## 架構優化 — Handler 層殘留違規修正

- privateshop.go：業務邏輯移入 PrivateShopSystem（ExecuteBuy/ExecuteSell/SetupShop/CloseShop）
- clan.go：Food/FoodFullTime 修改移入 ClanSystem.HealMember
- movement.go：Heading 修改改為透過 world.State.ChangePlayerHeading()

## 城堡／攻城戰系統 — 完整實作

- 城堡資料表（8 座城堡）+ YAML 靜態地理資料 + DB repo
- CastleSystem：稅率/寶庫/攻城時間管理、城堡主權轉移
- CastleWarTickSystem：攻城戰排程（Phase 3 PostUpdate）
- WarSystem：宣戰/投降/休戰/勝敗判定、模擬戰 240 分鐘計時
- 守護塔/王冠：塔死亡 → 生成王冠 → 點擊轉移城堡
- 商店稅收：城堡稅 + 國稅 + 戰爭稅 + 迪亞得稅

## 攻城戰補足 — 投石車/戰爭禮物/攻城時間

- 投石車系統（NPC 90327-90337）：砲彈發射/範圍傷害/沉默效果/10 秒冷卻
- 戰爭禮物：攻城結束發放物品給守城方在線公會成員
- 攻城時間查詢：近衛兵 NPC askwartime + S_WarTime(231)
- 路燈生成系統

## 隊伍/GM 訊息/掉落分配補齊

- HandlePartyControl action 3：聊天組隊邀請（C_ChatParty case 3）
- SendGmMessage / BroadcastToGMs：S_OPCODE_NPCSHOUT type=0 \fY 黃色文字
- GiveDrops 自動分配：按 HateList 加權隨機分配給範圍內隊員

commit.message:
fix: symlink bundled profiles into datadir for OrcaSlicer inheritance (v5.57.2)

The --datadir was empty so OrcaSlicer couldn't resolve profile inheritance
chains (fdm_bbl_3dp_001_common, etc.), causing G92 E0 validation failures.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

perf: Optimize MA latest/all queries - 25s → <2s

- Add 3 new DB indexes on unified_v3 and funding_ma for range scans
- Replace expensive INNER JOIN + MAX(calculated_at) pattern with direct
  GROUP BY on a 2h time window in getLatestMAAll (all 3 branches)
- Add idx_funding_ma_exch_period_calc and idx_funding_ma_cross_period_calc
  for exchange-specific and cross-exchange queries

Results (cache MISS):
  /ma/latest/all?exchange=*:          25s → 1.6s
  /ma/latest/all?exchange=hyperliquid: 9s → 0.27s
  /ma/latest/all (cross-exchange):     1s → 2s (stable)
  /funding/rates/latest:              26s → 1.8s

commit.message:
Rounds 83-89: Eval harness improvements, lint cleanup (23→14), fresh audit

Eval improvements:
- Non-CID JSON detection in API route (wraps raw JSON as message)
- Node reordering: output-category nodes always last with edge remapping
- Added model override to eval harness (CLI arg or MODEL env var)
- Test pool grew 44→58 tests across 10+ industries
- 4 consecutive 100% scores on both deepseek-reasoner and deepseek-chat

Lint cleanup (23→14 warnings):
- Removed unused BUILT_IN_CATEGORIES import (TopBar.tsx)
- Removed unused edges destructure (TopBar.tsx)
- Removed 4 unused type imports (reflection.ts: DomainExpertise,
  WorkflowPreference, CommunicationStyle, GrowthEdge)
- Prefixed unused vars: _MAX_LEGACY_PATTERNS, _drives, _existingEdges

Audit (docs/audit-2026-03-08.md):
- Architecture A-, Security B+, Performance B, Code Quality B+
- Error Handling B, State Management B+, Accessibility C+, Testing C
- Top findings: no rate limiting on /api/cid, missing error boundaries,
  store monolith (4,622 lines), ARIA gaps in icon-only buttons

Session 36 — /gouvernement SIGINT Redesign + Judicial Research DB Corrections

commit.message:
Fix invisible text bug: replace CSS animation with transition-based reveal

- Swap @keyframes fadeUp + animationend for CSS transitions — more reliable
  across browsers and with prefers-reduced-motion
- Lower IntersectionObserver threshold from 0.12 → 0.05 so elements that
  barely enter the viewport still trigger correctly
- Replace animationend listener with transitionend (property: opacity) which
  strips helper classes after the entrance animation completes
- Add revealScrolledPast() scroll listener that catches any .animate elements
  the smooth-scroll moved past before the observer callback could fire

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix(notes): dictate now types at cursor — fix stale closure + wrong insertion method

Two bugs stopped transcribed text from appearing in the editor:

1. Stale closure: onresult captured `editor` at the moment toggleDictation was
   called. Added editorRef (kept current via useEffect) so the callback always
   has the live editor instance regardless of when it fires.

2. Wrong insertion: chain().focus().insertContent() calls focus() on every word,
   which can jump the cursor to position 0. Replaced with
   editorRef.current?.commands.insertContent() — inserts at the current cursor
   without touching focus.

Also focus the editor once before recognition starts so there is a valid cursor
position for the first word.

commit.message:
fix: increase Workday inter-tenant delay 2s → 60s to avoid rate limiting

Confirmed via testing: single isolated calls succeed, but calls < ~30s apart
trigger HTTP 400 blocks across all tenants. 60s interval resolves this.
13 tenants × 60s = ~13 min total, well within the nightly 2 AM window.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

feat: 업무 보드 상태 '시작 전'을 '작성중'/'착수 대기중'으로 분리 (#154)

사용자가 요청사항을 작성하는 도중 에이전트가 조기 착수하는 문제 해결.
- 작성중: 사용자가 내용을 작성하는 단계 (에이전트 착수 금지)
- 착수 대기중: 사용자가 작성 완료 후 에이전트 착수를 허가한 상태
에이전트는 '착수 대기중' 상태만 폴링하여 착수함.

https://claude.ai/code/session_0141ZbcvnY1XFazWqsJigDPc

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Merge Phase 3: Japanese Phonetization System

**Summary:**
Complete implementation of Japanese phonetization system for Piper TTS training,
enabling conversion of Japanese text (kanji + kana) to phoneme ID sequences.

**Components Delivered:**

**Phase 3a - Domain Layer:**
- Phoneme value objects (Phoneme, HiraganaText, PhonemeSequence)
- PhonemeMap entity with deterministic ID assignment
- JSON serialization/deserialization
- 56 tests, 84% coverage

**Phase 3b - Infrastructure Layer:**
- PykakasiAdapter: Kanji → hiragana conversion (14 tests, 100%)
- HiraganaPhonetizer: Hiragana → phoneme IDs (9 tests, 100%)
- Port definitions for clean architecture

**Phase 3c - Application Layer:**
- phonemize_japanese_corpus use case (2-pass orchestration)
- CLI script: scripts/phonemize_japanese.py
- 11 tests, 88% coverage

**Phase 3d - Validation:**
- 7 integration tests on JSUT-like corpus
- Performance validated: 1000 samples < 30 sec
- Deterministic ordering verified

**Total Test Coverage:**
- 97 tests passing (35 + 21 + 14 + 9 + 11 + 7)
- Quality gates: ✅ ruff ✅ mypy ✅ pytest
- 88% application layer coverage
- 100% infrastructure adapter coverage

**Key Features:**
- Hiragana-as-phonemes strategy (~100 unique symbols)
- Deterministic phoneme ID assignment (sorted order)
- Strong typing with value objects
- Clean architecture (DDD + Hexagonal)
- Comprehensive error handling

**Usage:**
```bash
uv run python scripts/phonemize_japanese.py \
  --input dataset/metadata.csv \
  --output dataset/metadata_phonemes.csv \
  --phoneme-map dataset/phoneme_map.json
```

**Next Phase:** Piper preprocessing and training pipeline integration

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)
